CREATE TABLE source_table (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE target_table (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE temp_table (id UInt32, category String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO temp_table SELECT id, name FROM source_table WHERE id > 1;
CREATE TABLE user_storage (user_id UInt32, access_level String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY user_id;
MOVE (SELECT user_id, access_level FROM user_storage) TO target_table;
SELECT * FROM target_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM source_table WHERE name LIKE 'A%');
CREATE TABLE archived_storage (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO archived_storage SELECT * FROM target_table WHERE id < 3;
MOVE (SELECT id, name FROM temp_table WHERE category = 'A') TO target_table;
